title: Novan
description: A low-tech progression and exploration focused modpack with a commitment to immersion and quality. Custom recipes and tweaks included!
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d5818dd88acf67ef65a6bb9f92d9238cce082a6_0.webp)

**This is Novan, a modpack focused on how Create and IE integrate with each other.**
# Features
⚡Balanced Low-Tech Progression System (**Create, Immersive Engineering**) Sets on how Create & IE interact above everything else

⚡Automation, Magic and Combat (**PneumaticCraft: Repressurized, Herexei, Tinkers Construct**)

⚡Hundreds of NEW Dungeons & Structures (**Dungeons Enhanced, Explorify, Structory**)

⚡Customized World Generation & Recipes that bind all the mods together to Create A **Cohesive Experience**

⚡QoL Additions and Features (**Waystones / Refined Storage / FTB Essentials**)

⚡Unique and Overhauled Biomes (**Incendium, Ecologics**)

⚡New Bosses and Mobs (**Meet Your Fight, Mowzie's Mobs**)

⚡**The Aether Dimension** with Addons (**Aether: Lost Content**)

⚡Many Custom Features & Sounds for an **Improved Experience**

⚡**Fully Optimized** (**Xenon, ModernFix, ImmediatelyFast**)

⚡**250+** Mods
## Requirements
_Allocating **3-4GB** RAM is recommended.
Make sure that the Curseforge App is using the latest **Java 17**._

_Thank you, all_
